topic: There is a head shaped dent in the pillow next to mine every morning but I sleep alone
title: There Is a Head-Shaped Dent in the Pillow Next to Mine Every Morning | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a head shaped dent in the pillow beside mine every morning. I sleep alone.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of two pillows on a bed, the right one holding a deep head shaped dent, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Queen bed. One side mine. I keep a second pillow only out of habit.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a queen bed in a dim bedroom, one side slept in, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sleep on the left. Always have.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the left side of a bed with rumpled sheets, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning the right pillow held a deep dent. A head had rested there.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a pillow with a deep head shaped impression, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand flipping a pillow over on a bed, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning the dent was back. Strands of grey hair on the case.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a pillow with a head dent and a few grey hairs on the pillowcase, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I removed the second pillow entirely.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a bed with only one pillow remaining, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I woke with my own head on the left. A dent in the bare sheet on the right.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a head shaped dent pressed into a bare bed sheet beside a pillow, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each morning the dent creeps closer. The mattress sinks there now.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a sagging mattress and a dent close beside a slept in spot, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night I felt the bed shift as weight settled in beside me. I did not move.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dim bed at night, the covers subtly depressed on one side as if weighted, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I bought a single bed and gave the queen away.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a narrow single bed in a small bedroom, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning there was a dent in the pillow beside me. The single bed has no other side.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a head shaped dent in a pillow on a single bed against a wall, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
